content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Hard Carry
description: An Effervescent Eridian relic designed for Digistruct Peak survivability. On its own it does nothing special, but when paired with Easy Mode it becomes an enormous durability boost for that specific endgame area.

special.description: When paired with the Easy Mode shield, it massively boosts maximum health and greatly extends Fight For Your Life duration, but only on Digistruct Peak.
special.title: Tough to lose when you're this broken.

abilities: Increases Fight For Your Life Time and Max Health while in the Raid on Digistruct Peak with the Easy Mode
